title: woodwardia orientalis
intro: Woodwardia orientalis, also known as Oriental Lady Fern or Oriental Chain Fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and parts of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Woodwardia orientalis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
